title: Clucking Ducks
description: Ducks as chicken variants! Uses texture from Minecraft Dungeons.
body:
![Clucking Ducks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/080b0362652a4c14d419a63a0a575e6cad26f5bc.png) _(Want more vanilla+ animal variants? Check out [**Earth Animals**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/earth-animals) and [**Frog Concept Variants**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/frog-concept-variants)!)_ Are they chickens or are they ducks? Well, why not both? Adds **Ducks** as a variant of the chicken! ## Features: - Ducks spawn around **rivers**, in **swamps**, and also may be found around **plains villages**. - Ducks lay their own eggs to hatch more ducks! - Adult Ducks use the texture created by Mojang for **Minecraft Dungeons**! - Baby Ducks have a texture inspired by real Mallard Chicks! - Duck Eggs and Duck Spawn Eggs can be summoned with functions. - **No OptiFine or CEM required!** This pack is compatible with all of my other mob variant data packs, including [**Earth Animals**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/earth-animals), which adds mob variants from Minecraft Earth! "Spawn Egg" textures can be obtained in survival with the [**Easter Eggs**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/spawn-egg-easter-eggs) resource pack!



## Operator Commands: _/function clucking_ducks:give_duck_egg_
– Give yourself Duck Egg _/function clucking_ducks:give_duck_spawn_egg_
– Give yourself Duck Spawn Egg ## If playing with world generation data packs: This data pack changes the River biome to spawn Ducks (chickens). If using another data pack that modifies worldgen (particularly the River biome), make sure that that data pack is loaded ABOVE Clucking Ducks before generating the world in order to get that data pack's custom river generation.

### Both the data pack AND the resource pack must be loaded!
